title: Tune optimizer procedure chart curve smoothing
description: Apply the same tuned curve smoothing used by ScoreChampionVersionTimeline to the optimization procedure task chart so procedure progress lines remain smooth but less overly curved.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Applied curveCardinal.tension(0.55) to OptimizerMetricsChart line interpolation, matching the champion timeline curve tuning. Added a focused test asserting optimizer metric lines receive a curve factory. Validation passed: OptimizerMetricsChart test, ScoreChampionVersionTimeline test, and dashboard typecheck.
